channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: White House rejects CNN's allegations about failing to cover Trump speech
Liberal judge criticizes Supreme Court conservatives, says Hawaii will defy ruling
item.description: Justice Todd Eddins accused the Roberts Court of reviving discredited 1857 and 1896 rulings while undermining constitutional rights and democracy.

item.title: Governor Evers endorses David Crowley for Wisconsin governor
item.description: Wisconsin Governor Tony Evers endorsed Milwaukee County Executive David Crowley in the state's Democratic gubernatorial primary, a day after the race began.

item.title: Representative Fine tells Newsmax networks skipping Trump speech is troubling
item.description: Representative Randy Fine, a Florida Republican, criticized ABC, NBC, and CNN for not broadcasting President Donald Trump's prime-time address.
